content.seo_title: Validate SaaS Ideas Fast: Marketing Automation for Students
content.seo_description: Stop guessing if your app will sell. Use marketing automation to validate ideas early. A beginner's guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop building in a vacuum. By automating your marketing funnel, you can put landing pages in front of real users within hours, not weeks. Use Antigravity to scaffold your landing page and Claude Code to deploy automated outreach, validating your idea through actual user traffic and feedback loops instantly.
content.intro:
The graveyard of startup ideas is littered with projects built in complete isolation. You spend weeks coding a masterpiece, only to launch to the sound of crickets. The silence isn't a failure of your code; it’s a failure of validation. You are currently building for a ghost audience that doesn't know you exist.

But the shift from 'student coder' to 'AI builder' happens when you stop treating marketing as an afterthought and start treating it as part of your tech stack. By leveraging automated feedback loops, you can turn your development process into a live experiment. Let’s dismantle the wall between your ideas and the market.

steps.title: Define Your Value Proposition
steps.description: Clarify exactly what problem you are solving before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean value proposition canvas for a SaaS that solves [INSERT PROBLEM]. Focus on the primary pain point for [INSERT TARGET AUDIENCE].
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a 3-point value proposition for a landing page aimed at [TARGET AUDIENCE].'

steps.title: Scaffold the Landing Page
steps.description: Build a high-converting landing page to capture emails and validate interest.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive React landing page component with a clear CTA, email capture form, and a section for testimonials.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx create-next-app@latest landing-page && cd landing-page && npm install framer-motion'

steps.title: Setup Automated Outreach
steps.description: Connect your landing page to an automated system that engages potential users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that integrates a web form submission with a Google Sheet to track potential user interest.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm install google-spreadsheet && node scripts/sync-leads.js'

steps.title: Integrate Feedback Loops
steps.description: Use automated emails to ask visitors why they are interested in your project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a template for an automated welcome email that asks users what specific feature they are looking for.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx resend-cli send --to user@example.com --subject "Your thoughts on [PROJECT NAME]?"'

steps.title: Analyze and Pivot
steps.description: Review the data collected to decide if you should proceed or pivot your idea.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a data analysis script that summarizes email open rates and form submission feedback.

pro_tips: Never build a backend feature until you have at least 10 'pre-orders' or sign-ups on your landing page.
Use a 'Fake Door' test: Add a button to a feature that doesn't exist yet to see if users actually click it.
Automate your social proof by scraping relevant community discussions to identify the exact language your users use.
Keep your initial landing page under 300 words; clarity beats creativity in early-stage validation.
If your conversion rate is below 5%, change your value proposition, not your landing page design.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully validated your idea, transition from landing page development to building the actual MVP features using the feedback you collected.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop guessing and start building products people actually want. Stop waiting for permission to be an entrepreneur. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
